summary: EXP-464 authored, status=ready-for-integration. Two-patch hub-designation for HOL-REDUNDANCY c2 Hole 3 (OTS canonical-hub-missing): P0 extends the Timestamp Error tab rationale paragraph in build-scripts/generate-html.js (~+150 words) to add explicit hub-designation language and name the three spokes (§1.4, §8.5, Part 6 prospective bucket); P1 inserts one hub-pointer paragraph into part8 §8.5 body in data/sections.json (~+140 words) distinguishing the AI-directive framing from the canonical methodology critique. ANALYST OVERRIDE of curmudgeon options a/b — the canonical hub already exists as the dedicated Timestamp Error tab (rendered at docs/index.html div id=timestamp from build-scripts/generate-html.js line 1884+), just not data-modeled in sections.json; correct minimal fix is to make its hub status explicit + convert §8.5 to a spoke. review_class: deep-attack. HTML rebuild required after integration. tests/run.sh should pass (no DATA-blob touches).
